c.d: The quantity of unique photo effects and filters available within the application.
c.s: App Store, Google Play Store, App Documentation

c.d: Subjective assessment of how easy the app is to use, considering the complexity of features and user interface.
The degree to which effects and filters can be adjusted and personalized by the user.
The seamlessness and availability of sharing edited photos to social media platforms.
Availability of advanced tools like layers, masking, healing, and RAW support.
